description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the iTweak Upload module 6.x-1.x before 6.x-1.2 and 6.x-2.x before 6.x-2.3 for Drupal allows remote authenticated users, with create content and upload file permissions, to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the file name of an uploaded file.
